content: The largest type of fruit is the pumpkin, specifically the Atlantic Giant pumpkin, which can weigh up to 2,600 pounds (1,179 kg) and reach a diameter of over 13 feet (4 meters). The largest type of vegetable is the cabbage, specifically the Giant cabbage, which can weigh up to 100 pounds (45 kg) and reach a diameter of over 3 feet (90 cm).
